relationships: kab:S kra n win i t-yessnen akken ilaq yettqadar-it

kab:Ulac win yellan da isem-is akken
kab:Ulac win i yellan deg tneɣrit-nni tura

kab:Ulac win izemren ad yeqdec ɣef sin ikerwayen
